events.event_description: U.S. legation-level mission established in Burundi upon independence, with Herbert Vincent Olds presenting credentials as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Herbert Vincent Olds, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1962-07-01.

events.event_description: U.S. mission elevated from legation to embassy when Donald Albert Dumont was promoted from Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.

evidence.quote: Donald Albert Dumont, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1962-10-25. Credentials presented: 1963-01-17. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1963-09-16.
